title: Entry March
cue: After the Tyler knocks once and the door is opened
lyrics: The Grand Team outside need to be able to hear the first note of this, so wait accordingly.

title: Be Seated
file: audio/Installation/Incidental_2Bolsward - Martinikerk - Martin Mans - Friesche Volksliedjes.mp3
cue: After the Proclaiming Officer says - Be Seated, Brethren.
lyrics: Keep an eye on the Proclaiming Officer.  If he sits, end the tune.  If he comes out to do Grand Honors, end it before he needs to talk

title: Collar Collect
cue: After the Grand Deacons stand up
lyrics: The Proclaiming Officer will have just retiring officers to remove their collars

title: FIX Get the Master Elect
cue: After the Grand Deacons stand
lyrics: This happens as soon as the Installed Board is opened

title: So Mote It Be
cue: Start it as he says - holy name
lyrics: This is the end of the prayer by the Grand Officer in the Chaplain position

title: Before Thy Altar Kneel
cue: After the ME kneels and the Installing Master knocks

title: Seal the VSL
cue: After the Installing Master says - Three Times
lyrics: Keep thy tongue from evil, etc.

title: HS

lyrics: This track gets loud, so keep an eye on it.
